{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093440DEDE3B359EF2D231FEB9"}"},"total":3165},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7203727050040656677","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节设定不错，文笔也好，个人感觉看的满爽的，只是不够看，期待后续更精彩！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1677248527,"group_id":"7196823518393142304","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5wqsGkzHvZpP4tpB8IcHbpDS7iG0Ck27xRslLnnX7/b","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"2783592038802579","user_name":"提笔忘情."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2783592038802579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196823518393142304","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田】+【轻松】+【架空】+【无系统】
秦羽穿越了，开局秦王府二公子。
他爹是大魏异姓王，户部尚书。
他娘是江南世家女，多财多亿。
他哥是镇疆大将军，举世无双。
面对如此深厚的背影，超然的地位，秦羽原地摆烂，声色犬马，醉卧美人膝。
但一次意外，让他进入了魏皇视野，从此一发不可收拾。
魏皇：秦羽，朕的公主，你自己看着办！
皇后：羽儿，谁欺负你，本宫为你撑腰！
太子：老秦，你说的全都对！
公主：秦郎，此生非你不嫁！
百官：秦贼，你要不要脸了！
异族：秦兽，你不要过来啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f6575e09fd756e2a96eabc548019531c","author":"烟雨’","author_id":"","book_id":"7196823518393142304","book_name":"金牌帝婿","book_short_name":"无双驸马爷","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182860","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7196849245440344588","read_count":"113180","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3002967"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1486","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,开局,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/204dc1f34f62f71386a7043110e7a05a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779500080&x-signature=qh%2FxgwHyzQfvS3pcDv8gvWFF5tY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"60561929457","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.765873e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093440DEDE3B359EF2D231FEB9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":154,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8765,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":104519},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1677332709,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7453507145219572505","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩的一本书[偷笑]我想主人公的生活应该是大多男生梦寐以求的生活，娶的媳妇都是身份背景强大不说，个个长的美若天仙，左拥右抱的好不快活，男主花心但不滥情，利用自己在现代的知识玩转古代，纵横天下无敌完成几国统一带领百姓过上幸福的生活！男主活的通透，在权利打到巅峰以后没有迷恋权势，及时行乐，真是大智若愚。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735424384,"group_id":"7196823518393142304","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢看书的书呆呆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8CQj1yK08cltz9dwWoEYVQzsON7NiYYgA8O/ngSqOqM","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4265709972497277","user_name":"牡丹飘香zly"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4265709972497277","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196823518393142304","book_info":{"abstract":"【种田】+【轻松】+【架空】+【无系统】
